search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:firmwareupgrades" status="Completed" $orgid$ | dedup upgradeId | timechart span=1h count as "Upgrades Completed"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:firmwareupgrades" $orgid$ | dedup upgradeId | eval completedAt= replace(completedAt, "UTC", "") | rename upgradeId as "Upgrade Id", upgradeBatchId as "Upgrade Batch Id", network.name as "Network Name", status as "Status", completedAt as "Completed At", fromVersion.shortName as "From", toVersion.shortName as "To", toVersion.releaseType as "Release Type" | table "Network Name", "Upgrade Id", "Upgrade Batch Id", "From", "To", "Status", "Completed At", "Release Type"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:firmwareupgrades" $orgid$ | dedup upgradeId | eval completedAt= replace(completedAt, "UTC", "") | search upgradeId="$row.Upgrade Id$" upgradeBatchId="$row.Upgrade Batch Id$" network.name="$row.Network Name$" status="$row.Status$" completedAt="$row.Completed At$" fromVersion.shortName="$row.From$" toVersion.shortName="$row.To$" toVersion.releaseType="$row.Release Type$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
